name: mics-webterminal-cli
description: Command-line client for micsapp-webterminal — run remote shell commands, manage files, tokens, and quick commands over HTTPS.

scripts.build:linux: pkg . --targets node20-linux-x64 --output dist/mics_cli-linux-x64 && pkg . --targets node20-linux-arm64 --output dist/mics_cli-linux-arm64
scripts.build:mac: pkg . --targets node20-macos-x64 --output dist/mics_cli-macos-x64 && pkg . --targets node20-macos-arm64 --output dist/mics_cli-macos-arm64
scripts.build:all: npm run build:linux && npm run build:mac && npm run build:win
